name: ResourcesDayView
description: Day view with resource columns for scheduling across resources
searchText: resourcesdayview day view with resource columns for scheduling across resources @mantine/schedule /schedule/resources-day-view businesshours candragevent canresizeevent date endtime events grouplabelwidth groups headerformat highlightbusinesshours intervalminutes labels locale maxeventspertimeslot mode moreeventsprops nextcontrolprops ondatechange oneventclick oneventdragend oneventdragstart oneventdrop oneventresize onexternaleventdrop onslotdragend ontimeslotclick onviewchange previouscontrolprops radius recurrenceexpansionlimit renderevent rendereventbody rendergrouplabel renderresourcelabel resources rowheight scrollareaprops slotlabelformat slotwidth startscrolltime starttime todaycontrolprops viewselectprops withcurrenttimebubble withcurrenttimeindicator withdragslotselect witheventresize witheventsdraganddrop withheader

props.name: businessHours
props.description: Business hours range in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: canDragEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be dragged

props.name: canResizeEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be resized

props.name: date
props.description: Day to display, Date object or date string in YYYY-MM-DD format

props.name: endTime
props.description: End time for the day view, in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: events
props.description: List of events to display

props.name: groupLabelWidth
props.description: Width of the group label column

props.name: groups
props.description: List of resource groups to display as a column to the left of resource labels

props.name: headerFormat
props.description: Dayjs format for header label

props.name: highlightBusinessHours
props.description: If set to true, highlights business hours with white background

props.name: intervalMinutes
props.description: Number of minutes for each interval in the day view

props.name: labels
props.description: Labels override

props.name: locale
props.description: Locale passed down to dayjs, overrides value defined on DatesProvider

props.name: maxEventsPerTimeSlot
props.description: Maximum number of events visible per time slot before "+more" indicator shows, minimum value is 1

props.name: mode
props.description: Interaction mode

props.name: moreEventsProps
props.description: Props passed down to MoreEvents component

props.name: nextControlProps
props.description: Props passed to next control

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called with the new date value when a date is selected

props.name: onEventClick
props.description: Called when event is clicked

props.name: onEventDragEnd
props.description: Called when any event drag ends

props.name: onEventDragStart
props.description: Called when any event drag starts

props.name: onEventDrop
props.description: Called when event is dropped at new time, includes target resourceId

type.name: ((data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onEventResize
props.description: Called when event is resized

type.name: (data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; }) => void

props.name: onExternalEventDrop
props.description: Called when an external item is dropped onto the schedule

type.name: ((data: { dataTransfer: DataTransfer; dropDateTime: string; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onSlotDragEnd
props.description: Called when a time slot range is selected by dragging, includes resourceId

type.name: ((data: { rangeStart: string; rangeEnd: string; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onTimeSlotClick
props.description: Called when time slot is clicked, includes resourceId

type.name: ((data: { slotStart: string; slotEnd: string; nativeEvent: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onViewChange
props.description: Called when view level select button is clicked

props.name: previousControlProps
props.description: Props passed to previous control

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: recurrenceExpansionLimit
props.description: Max number of generated recurring instances per recurring series

props.name: renderEvent
props.description: Function to fully customize event rendering

props.name: renderEventBody
props.description: Function to customize event body

props.name: renderGroupLabel
props.description: Function to customize group label rendering

props.name: renderResourceLabel
props.description: Function to customize resource label rendering

props.name: resources
props.description: List of resources to display as rows

props.name: rowHeight
props.description: Height of each resource row

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to the ScrollArea component

props.name: slotLabelFormat
props.description: Dayjs format for slot labels or a callback function that returns formatted value

props.name: slotWidth
props.description: Width of each time slot column

props.name: startScrollTime
props.description: Time to scroll to on initial render, in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: startTime
props.description: Start time for the day view, in HH:mm:ss format

props.name: todayControlProps
props.description: Props passed to today control

props.name: viewSelectProps
props.description: Props passed to view level select

props.name: withCurrentTimeBubble
props.description: If set, the time indicator displays the current time in the bubble

props.name: withCurrentTimeIndicator
props.description: If set, displays a vertical line indicating the current time. By default, displayed only for the current day.

props.name: withDragSlotSelect
props.description: If set, enables drag-to-select time slot ranges

props.name: withEventResize
props.description: If true, events can be resized by dragging their left/right edges

props.name: withEventsDragAndDrop
props.description: If true, events can be dragged and dropped

props.name: withHeader
props.description: If set, the header is displayed
